inputs.label: Number 3
inputs.businessContext: Third number (optional, set to 1 if unused in multiplication, or 0 if unused in addition)

inputs.label: Number 4
inputs.businessContext: Fourth number (optional, set to 1 if unused in multiplication, or 0 if unused in addition)

inputs.label: Operation
inputs.businessContext: 1 = addition/subtraction (rounds to fewest decimal places), 2 = multiplication/division (rounds to fewest significant figures)

formulas.rawResult: operation == 1 ? (num1 + num2 + num3 + num4) : (num1 * num2 * num3 * num4)
formulas.minDecimalPlaces: operation == 1 ? Math.min(num1.toString().split('.')[1] ? num1.toString().split('.')[1].length : 0, num2.toString().split('.')[1] ? num2.toString().split('.')[1].length : 0, num3.toString().split('.')[1] ? num3.toString().split('.')[1].length : 0, num4.toString().split('.')[1] ? num4.toString().split('.')[1].length : 0) : 0
formulas.minSigFigs: operation == 2 ? (function(){ function sigFigs(n) { if (n == 0) return 1; n = Math.abs(n); var str = n.toExponential(); var mantissa = str.split('e')[0].replace(/\./g, '').replace(/^0+/, ''); return mantissa.length; } return Math.min(sigFigs(num1), sigFigs(num2), sigFigs(num3), sigFigs(num4)); })() : 0
formulas.roundedResult: operation == 1 ? Math.round(rawResult * Math.pow(10, minDecimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, minDecimalPlaces) : (function() { if (rawResult == 0) return 0; var r = Math.abs(rawResult); var factor = Math.pow(10, minSigFigs - 1 - Math.floor(Math.log10(r))); return Math.round(rawResult * factor) / factor; })()
